records.short_description: Mobile Number Requirement for Account Creation should be optional
records.description:
Regarding the mandatory mobile number requirement, we are currently experiencing difficulties creating new accounts.

The system validates actual phone numbers, and all available numbers in our office, including employees' personal numbers, have already been used for account creation.

For further testing, could you please advise how we should proceed once we receive the new test vehicles?

There is currently a workaround that allows us to skip the mobile number step and proceed with email registration. However, this does not appear to be the intended approach. We understand that it could still be used for testing purposes if necessary, but we would appreciate your guidance on the recommended process.

=== Billing Issue – Co Number Change / Check ===
=== Please include the following information ===

I got the following email for the second time (and this is the second ticket which I had to open because of this):

´´´
***Important notice: CO-Number required***

Dear Mr. Lauser,

As of July 1, 2026, the entry of a valid CO number in IAM AT requests will be mandatory.
This applies to all requests assigned to the following company areas:
Genesis 2724 and 0400.

Please ensure that a valid CO number is provided in all your IAM AT requests.

From July 1, 2026, only requests with a valid CO number can be processed.
Requests submitted without a CO number may result in service disruptions.

What does this mean for you?
Please contact your controller and maintain a valid CO/CA combination under General Data in IAM AT.
If you have any questions or uncertainties, please contact the responsible contacts or the IAM Support team.

Kind regards,
Your IAM AT Team
```

records.short_description: Request for CO Order Number for IAM AT Requests
records.description:
Hello Team,

I received communication regarding the mandatory requirement to provide a valid CO Number for IAM AT requests effective July 1, 2026, for company areas 2724 and 0400.

I reviewed the applications under my responsibility with Company ID 2724 and Cost Center 3059-4839, and I could not find any associated CO Order Number for the following applications:

Application ID	Application Name	Alias
9808	Client for Reporting Service 4.0	REPORT40
11904	SnapshotGen Service	USERSNAP
12175	Reporting Service 4.0 Rich Client	RSRCL

Could you please provide the corresponding CO Order Number(s) for these applications? If no CO Order Number has been assigned, I would appreciate your guidance on the appropriate process or contact point to obtain this information.

Thank you for your support.

Thanks
Sudarshan

## Help ##########################################################

   You need help with Alice?

################################################################

Describe your topic:
> Hello team, 

We encountered errors while creating the IAM request, and the updated LeanIX ID was not reflected. To resolve the issue, we created a new request, which is now working as expected.
Could you please assist us in removing the old requests that were causing issues? The request IDs are 15007 and 15134.

records.short_description: B. General information is needed on selected Service Offering
records.description:
Today we are reaching out to you because we cannot find an appropriate request in the IAM Approval Tool for your application in Alice.
The affected application is:
 
Workshop Maintenance Service
 
App ID: 
WRMNSERV

 
 
Why is this an issue?
Based on our billing model (Link), we are charging the service costs through the request in the IAM Approval Tool, where all ordered IAM services are processed.
When we do not find an appropriate, valid service request, we are not able to charge you for using our service.
What is a “valid service request”?
(1)  “GEMS/Alice” Authorization Management is selected
(2)    Service configurations with selected “GEMS/Alice” are available
What do I need to do now?
Please create or adjust a valid service request in the IAM Approval Tool that includes your Authorization ID (this is your Application ID in Alice) – see also the attached guide.
Afterwards, respond to this email with your request number.
 
In case your application is not active/required anymore, please also reply to this email to tell us so we can delete it.
 
What are the consequences if I do not act?
We will delete your application including all entitlements and assigned user authorizations by 15th March 2026
Warning: this would most likely impact your application to an extent that it is not working anymore at all.
 
Important note
We will monitor these request-app-relations monthly and apply the above actions whenever required.
Please make sure to have a valid service request at any time!
 
Support
For any questions related to the IAM Approval Tool, please create a ticket for IAM Approval tool at GCS_IAM_ApprovalTool_L1 (SNOW MBAG)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Will need support in addressing above , also me being the product owner , I do not have access to the project in IAMAT portal

records.description:
=== General Information needed ===
=== Please include the following information ===

## IAMAT Request No: 
-- [ ] No Request Number yet 
-- [x] Request Number: 8056
## Time Criticality: 
-- [ ] ASAP (Critical) 
-- [x] Few days (Critical) 
-- [ ] Less Critical 

==================================================

## Are you missing information or links
-- [x] Yes
-- [ ] No

## Do you need information around service costs
-- [ ] Yes
-- [x] No

## Supported Features
-- [ ] Yes
-- [ ] No

## Other
-- [x] Yes
-- [ ] No

==================================================

++ Additional Information or Problem Description: 
I am currently configuring the Alice Access API for my application (KNIME) in the IAM Approval Tool.

My goal is to access authorization data (entitlements) from additional applications (Lead-IT and IMPULSE) via the Alice Access API.

For this purpose, I created a new draft version of the Alice Access API Service Configuration in IAM AT. 
I also received the corresponding Authorization IDs from the Application Owner of the target applications.

However, I am facing the following issue:

- The button "Add Authorization ID" in the IAM AT configuration is visible but disabled (greyed out)
- It is not possible to select or add any Authorization ID
- As a result, I cannot extend the configuration to include additional applications

- I have attached a screenshot showing the Alice Access API Service Configuration and the disabled "Add Authorization ID" button for better understanding of the issue.

Based on previous information (from Alice Support Team), it should be possible to reference additional applications via Authorization ID in the IAM AT configuration. 

However, it is unclear:
- whether my application needs to be explicitly enabled/whitelisted as a consumer for the target Authorization IDs
- whether additional configuration is required on the target application side
- or whether a backend setup / support action is required to make the Authorization IDs selectable in IAM AT

I already checked the IAM Approval Tool configuration in detail:

We already checked IAM AT but could not find any configuration option for additional Application IDs.

Additionally, the official documentation does not describe where and how additional Authorization IDs / Application access can be configured in IAM AT.

The behavior suggests that the Authorization IDs are not selectable because the required authorization or mapping between applications is missing.

Therefore, I need support to:

1. Understand why the "Add Authorization ID" button is disabled
2. Clarify the required steps to enable cross-application access via Alice Access API
3. Get the required configuration / authorization in place so that the Authorization IDs become selectable

If needed, I can provide:
- Authorization ID of the target application "IMPULSE"
- Application ID(s)
- contact details of the respective Application Owners
- additional screenshots

==================================================

*** Please always check our help page *** 

*** Guidelines *** 
1. Mandatory fields start with `##_...` 
2. Optional fields start with `++_...` 
3a. Single value selection allowed: `[ ] Value 1` or `[ ] Value 2` 
3b. Multi-value selection allowed: `[x] Value 1`, `[x] Value 2`, `[ ] Value 3`

Guten Tag,

ich wende mich an Sie bzgl. einer Namensänderung. Ich trage seit letztem Samstag den Nachnamen meines Mannes. 

Laut den Kollegen vom Service-Now Team soll ich mich bzgl. der neuen E-Mail-Adresse an Sie wenden.

(Alter Nachname: Sögüt)

Neuer Nachname: Kaya

Anbei sende ich Ihnen die offizielle Bescheinigung bzgl. der Namensänderung vom Standesamt.

Falls Sie weitere Daten von mir benötigen, gerne melden.

Könnten Sie dies bitte veranlassen – vielen Dank vorab!

Mit freundlichen Grüßen / Kind regards / 致敬

(Frau/Ms.)Rojda Kaya

China Ramp-Up Planning

Anlauf- und Änderungsmanagement

Mercedes-Benz AG
 Werk Sindelfingen/HPC 050-L429
 Dornierstr. 7
 D-71034 Böblingen

Email: rojda.soeguet@mercedes-benz.com [mailto:rojda.soeguet@mercedes-benz.com]

Mercedes-Benz Group AG, Stuttgart, Germany | Sitz und Registergericht/Domicile and Court of Registry: Stuttgart, HRB-Nr./Commercial Register No.: 19360 
 Vorsitzender des Aufsichtsrats/Chairman of the Supervisory Board: Martin Brudermüller
 Vorstand/Board of Management: Ola Källenius, Vorsitzender/Chairman; Jörg Burzer, Mathias Geisen, Britta Seeger, Oliver Thöne, Olaf Schick, Harald Wilhelm, Michael Schiebe

Wenn diese E-Mail nicht für Sie bestimmt ist, bitten wir Sie, uns umgehend über den irrtümlichen Empfang zu informieren und diese E-Mail zu löschen. Wir danken Ihnen für Ihre Unterstützung. 
 If you are not the addressee, please inform us immediately that you have received this e-mail by mistake, and delete it. We thank you for your support.
